schema.name: bash
schema.description: Runs a bash command under the NDX virtual root. Use file tools for reading, searching, and editing files. Prefer project-relative workdir paths like apps/...; never write them as /apps/....

workdir.description: Working directory relative to the project root. Defaults to project root. Prefer project-relative paths; absolute paths must stay under the NDX virtual root.

max_output_tokens.description: Approximate token budget for returned output.
